evals.prompt: Generate speech from 'Hello world, welcome to ElevenLabs!' and save it as hello.mp3 using Python. Use a natural sounding voice.
evals.expected_output: A Python script that uses the ElevenLabs SDK to convert text to speech and save as MP3
expectations: Uses 'from elevenlabs import ElevenLabs' for the import
Calls client.text_to_speech.convert() with the text parameter
Writes output to a file named hello.mp3
Does NOT use the deprecated 'elevenlabs' v1 API (no 'from elevenlabs import generate')

evals.prompt: Write a Node.js script that converts the text 'Bonjour le monde, bienvenue chez ElevenLabs' to French speech using ElevenLabs. Use their multilingual model. Save as bonjour.mp3.
evals.expected_output: A JavaScript/TypeScript script using the ElevenLabs JS SDK with multilingual model
expectations: Uses the eleven_multilingual_v2 model or another multilingual model
Passes the French text as input

evals.prompt: Show me how to do streaming text-to-speech with ElevenLabs in Python — I want to play audio as it's being generated, not wait for the whole thing.
evals.expected_output: Python code demonstrating streaming TTS with real-time playback
expectations: Uses a streaming method (convert_as_stream or similar streaming approach)
Demonstrates processing audio chunks as they arrive
Explains or shows how to play audio in real-time
